description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a flat roof and a modern, boxy architectural style. The front facade features large windows, a prominent entry door, and a small balcony above the entrance. The exterior is finished in a mix of light gray and white materials, with some brick or stone texturing visible on the lower portion. The house is set back from a long, narrow sidewalk or driveway that runs parallel to the front. The rear and side elevations have fewer windows and a more utilitarian appearance, with some small windows and plain wall surfaces. The interior layout is partially visible from above, showing multiple rooms and a staircase.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large front windows, and a mix of light gray and white exterior finishes. The house features a prominent entryway and a small balcony above the door.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, the main entry door, a small balcony, and the sidewalk or driveway in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the flat roof, and the extension of the sidewalk or driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and plain wall surfaces, showing the back of the house and the continuation of the sidewalk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the flat roof, side wall, and the sidewalk or driveway running alongside.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows and smaller side/rear windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent front door with a small balcony above, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
